title: Colorful Sea Lanterns
description: Adds craft-able sea lanterns of all dye colors.
body:
This mod adds 16 new colorful sea lanterns! They're all craftable by surrounding dye with sea lanterns!

Rainbow variant coming in the future maybe?!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0467ff65ba79e1fadf64597cd8a87b2bdda0e74a.png)
